payload.title: Missing DMARC record for coinary.ai
payload.description: No DMARC record found. Email authentication policy is not enforced.
payload.recommendation: Add a DMARC TXT record (e.g., v=DMARC1; p=reject).

payload.title: WAF Detected: Cloudflare
payload.description: A Web Application Firewall (Cloudflare) was detected. Probe URL returned status 403.
payload.evidence: WAF: Cloudflare | Status: 403 | Headers: {'date': 'Fri, 03 Apr 2026 06:47:59 GMT', 'content-type': 'text/html; charset=UTF-8', 'transfer-encoding': 'chunked', 'connection': 'keep-alive', 'cache-control': 'private, max-age=0, no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, post-check=0, pre-check=0', 'expires': 'Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:01 GMT', 'referrer-policy': 'same-origin', 'nel': '{"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800}', 'x-frame-options': 'SAMEORIGIN', 'speculation-rules': '"/cdn-cgi/speculation"', 'report-to': '{"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=sSP3R%2F12UoZs%2BmMuYDIQRXS7n6OS7KqkrNXObGgiq9Ckx%2FT2Xn8LOTj7x3ti2RqbAZmtkIgx2HkOXnQUFjG1WF0h4oWjUd%2Be0oc96jhHXwzkMsHa6p4ABVhNkQGt"}]}', 'content-encoding': 'gzip', 'server': 'cloudflare', 'cf-ray': '9e662004fd2f80f5-NRT'}

payload.title: CSP: unsafe-inline in script-src
payload.description: The script-src directive allows 'unsafe-inline', which permits inline scripts and undermines XSS protection.
payload.recommendation: Remove 'unsafe-inline' from script-src and use nonces or hashes instead.

payload.title: MTA-STS policy not found
payload.description: No MTA-STS policy was found at https://coinary.ai/.well-known/mta-sts.txt. MTA-STS enforces TLS for email delivery and prevents downgrade attacks.
payload.evidence: GET https://coinary.ai/.well-known/mta-sts.txt returned no valid MTA-STS policy
payload.recommendation: Publish an MTA-STS policy at /.well-known/mta-sts.txt and configure the mta-sts DNS TXT record. Set mode to 'enforce' after testing.

payload.title: Email authentication headers not present
payload.description: No email authentication headers (Authentication-Results, DKIM-Signature) were found in the response from https://coinary.ai. This may indicate SPF, DKIM, and DMARC are not configured.
payload.evidence: No email authentication headers in response from https://coinary.ai
payload.recommendation: Configure SPF, DKIM, and DMARC DNS records for your domain. Use a DMARC policy of 'reject' or 'quarantine' to prevent spoofing.

error: Using http2=True, but the 'h2' package is not installed. Make sure to install httpx using `pip install httpx[http2]`.

payload.title: DOM-based XSS: source-to-sink pattern detected
payload.description: JavaScript contains both DOM XSS sources (7) and sinks (9). Sources: document.referrer, document.cookie, window.location. Sinks: .innerHTMLs*=, .outerHTMLs*=, setTimeouts*(.
payload.recommendation: Sanitize all DOM sources before passing to sinks. Use textContent instead of innerHTML.

payload.title: Prototype Pollution risk detected
payload.description: JavaScript contains prototype pollution pattern: __proto__
payload.recommendation: Freeze prototypes. Validate object keys. Use Map instead of plain objects.

payload.title: security.txt present but incomplete (RFC 9116)
payload.description: The security.txt file exists but is missing fields required or recommended by RFC 9116: missing required 'Contact' field, missing recommended 'Expires' field.
payload.evidence: HTTP 200 at https://coinary.ai/.well-known/security.txt; issues: missing required 'Contact' field, missing recommended 'Expires' field
payload.recommendation: Ensure security.txt contains at minimum a 'Contact' field and an 'Expires' field.

payload.title: Unnecessary service exposed: /actuator
payload.description: A management or diagnostic endpoint is publicly accessible at https://coinary.ai/actuator. This may expose sensitive configuration, environment variables, or system information.
payload.evidence: Path: /actuator | Status: 200 | Content length: 4714

payload.title: Sensitive file exposed: /backup.sql
payload.description: The path /backup.sql is publicly accessible and returned a 200 response with 4714 bytes of content. This may expose sensitive configuration data, credentials, or source history.
payload.evidence:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="ko">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/images/favicon.ico" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Coinary - 실시간 코인 호재/악재와 변동성</title>

    <link rel="canonical" href="https://coinary.ai/" />
  <meta property="og:locale" content="ko_KR" />
  <meta property="og:locale:alternate" content="en_US" />
payload.recommendation: Restrict access to /backup.sql via web server configuration or remove the file.

payload.title: OAuth PKCE Not Enforced
payload.description: OAuth endpoint at https://coinary.ai/oauth/authorize accepted an authorization request without code_challenge (PKCE). OAuth endpoint accepted request without code_challenge parameter. This enables authorization code interception attacks.
payload.evidence:
GET https://coinary.ai/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=test_client&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fattacker.example.com%2Fcallback&scope=openid&state=vibee_pkce_test → 200: <!doctype html>
<html lang="ko">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/images/favicon.ico" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initi
payload.recommendation: Require PKCE (code_challenge and code_verifier) for all public clients. Reject authorization requests that omit code_challenge with error: invalid_request / code_challenge_required.

payload.title: SAML Endpoint Discovered
payload.description: A SAML endpoint was found at https://coinary.ai/saml/sso (HTTP 200). The endpoint appears to reject unsigned responses correctly.
payload.evidence: GET https://coinary.ai/saml/sso → 200
payload.recommendation: Ensure SAML signature validation remains enforced and all SAML libraries are up to date.
